## Narrative Planning Implication

- For this sample, OCR through at least report page `16` should be sufficient to cover the main narrative.
- A TOC-aware intake test should confirm the OCR window reaches the final narrative section, here `9 Limitations`.
- Later attachments, boring logs, and exhibits should be handled as targeted follow-up OCR, not part of the initial narrative pass.
